title: Pickaxe & Shovel 3x3
description: Adds special pickaxe and shovel tools that break blocks in a 3x3 area with sound and blast effects.
body:
# **Pickaxe & Shovel 3x3**

Pickaxe & Shovel 3x3 transforms the way you mine and dig in Minecraft by giving players powerful tools that make resource gathering faster and more enjoyable The plugin introduces special pickaxes and shovels that can break blocks in a 3x3x3 area allowing you to collect ores, dirt, sand, gravel, and other materials much more efficiently These tools are unbreakable so you never have to worry about durability and they glow in your inventory making them easy to spot The 3x3 Pickaxe excels at mining stone and ore blocks while the 3x3 Shovel handles dirt, sand, and similar materials The tools are designed to feel natural in gameplay providing a satisfying experience without disrupting balance Each block you break with these tools triggers subtle visual and sound effects enhancing the feeling of power and impact _**Server owners are automatically notified in-game whenever a new version of the plugin is available**_ keeping them up to date with the latest improvements and fixes This ensures that the plugin remains compatible and enjoyable over time Pickaxe & Shovel 3x3 is a simple yet effective way to make mining and digging less tedious more fun and visually engaging while giving players a tangible reward for using these powerful tools



